function.name: searchLearnedProcedures
function.description: Search previously learned operation shortcuts (e.g. URLs, tool sequences) that can be reused for the current task. Call this BEFORE starting a multi-step browser or tool operation to check if a known shortcut exists. Results are historical references — you still need to actually execute the tools.

Query.description: Describe the task you want to perform, e.g. '播放网易云音乐' or '打开GitHub'.
